content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Berland Crossword". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1494/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers n and m. The next n lines contain a string of length m.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the number of words that can be read from the grid.

hidden.label: max boundary
hidden.input:
1
10 10
aaaaaaaaaa

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Iterate over each character in the grid and check if it can be read horizontally or vertically.
